title: SouthEastern Class 375/376/377 Electrostar Pack [MTR4]
description: Every major Class 375, 376, and 377 livery iteration from 2004-now!
body:
![Class 377/5 and 377/1 EMUs, coupled together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893ce0951a96b8c63c0ee379db32b29407f196d5_0.webp)

# The SouthEastern Class 375/376/377 Electrostar Pack

Depicting 3 generations of SouthEastern operator, 3 unit classes, and 6 subclasses of Electrostar, and with a bonus Connex livery, the SouthEastern Class 375/375/377 Electrostar Pack is here!

Featuring:
- Connex South Eastern, Strategic Rail Authority Southeastern, Govia SouthEastern, and OLR SouthEastern 
- Class 375/3s, 375/6s, and 375/9s
- Class 376/0s
- Class 377/1s and 377/5s
- Appropriate interiors for each livery
- Helpful consist lettering, marked ABC for 3 cars, ABCD for 4 cars, and ABCDE for Class 376s to make it easier to build formations!

## Included Liveries:

### 375/3:


Class 375/3  Strategic Rail Authority SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/3  SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/3  SE Blue

Class 375/3  SE Blue, First Class removed (post-2022 SE FC withdrawal)

Class 375/3  SE White, Blue Doors

Class 375/3  SE White, Yellow Doors

Class 375/3  SRA SE White, Yellow Doors


### 375/6:


Class 375/6 - Connex SE (375601)

Class 375/6 - Strategic Rail Authority SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/6 - SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/6 - SE White, Light Blue Doors w/Dark Blue Stripe

Class 375/6 - SE Blue

Class 375/6 - SE Blue, First Class removed (post-2022 SE FC withdrawal)

Class 375/6 - SE White, Blue Doors

Class 375/6 - SE White, Yellow Doors

Class 375/6 - Strategic Rail Authority SE White, Dark Blue Doors w/Gold Stripe (Royal Tunbridge Wells)

Class 375/6 - Strategic Rail Authority SE White, Dark Blue Doors (Royal Tunbridge Wells)

Class 375/6 - SE White, Dark Blue Doors (Royal Tunbridge Wells)


### 375/9:


Class 375/9 - Strategic Rail Authority SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/9 - SE White, Yellow Doors w/Grey Stripe

Class 375/9 - SE White, Light Blue Doors w/Dark Blue Stripe

Class 375/9 - SE Blue

Class 375/9 - SE Blue, First Class removed (post-2022 SE FC withdrawal)


### 376/0:


Class 376/0 (Pseudo) - SE White, Yellow Doors

Class 376/0 (Pseudo) - SE Blue


### 377/1:


Class 377/1 - Ex-Southern

Class 377/1 - 163+174 SE long-term hire


### 377/5:


Class 377/5 - SE ex First Capital Connect Blue

Class 377/5 - SE ex First Capital Connect Blue, First Class removed (post-2022 SE FC withdrawal)


![Class 376 and Class 375/9 EMUs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcd96e9b635b2af220d99d0c8413603bc624e63c.png)

Minecraft Transit Railway is the only requirement, and I hope you enjoy!
